title: TrainingPlanView.swift is 2141 lines — largest file, HISTORICAL v1
description: Largest Swift file in codebase. HISTORICAL v1, no longer in build target but inflates tooling and grep results.

title: SettingsView.swift (v2) is 1170 lines — actively compiled, decomposition candidate
description: 5 category groups, delete-account, export, sync controls all in one file. Too many responsibilities.
recommended_fix: Extract each category destination to its own file; SettingsView becomes ~200-line router

title: NutritionView.swift is 1112 lines — HISTORICAL v1
description: HISTORICAL v1, same archival need as TrainingPlanView.

title: MealEntrySheet.swift is 1155 lines — actively compiled, 17 @State vars, 4 tabs
description: Camera, photo picker, food search, label parsing all in one view. 17 @State properties indicate this needs a ViewModel.
recommended_fix: Extract each tab into own view, create MealEntryViewModel

title: SettingsView.swift (v1) is 1189 lines — HISTORICAL
description: HISTORICAL v1. Should be archived.

title: MainScreenView (v2) is 660 lines with 12 @State — approaching threshold
description: Above 500-line threshold. Milestone logic + 12 @State suggest ViewModel extraction needed.
recommended_fix: Extract HomeViewModel for milestone detection and state management

title: HISTORICAL MainScreenView has 11 raw .font(.system(size:)) calls
description: v1 file with DS-exception comments documenting need for AppText.metricResponsive token variants.
recommended_fix: If archived, no action. If token variants needed, add AppText.metricResponsive

title: Raw font size in v2 onboarding welcome — .font(.system(size: 32))
description: Token violation in actively compiled v2 file. Should use AppText.brandWordmark.
recommended_fix: Add AppText.brandWordmark token and use it

title: Raw font size in v2 onboarding — .font(.system(size: 36))
description: Hardcoded size in compiled v2 file.

title: Raw font size for close button — .font(.system(size: 22))
description: Hardcoded font size for icon.

title: Hardcoded font + fixed width — .font(.system(size: 40)) + .frame(width: 300)
description: Fixed width breaks Dynamic Type. Hardcoded font size.
recommended_fix: Use token + responsive layout (maxWidth instead of fixed width)

title: Deprecated .foregroundColor(.white) — raw color + deprecated API
description: Uses deprecated SwiftUI API and raw color literal.

title: Two raw .font(.system(size:)) in empty-state branches
description: Hardcoded sizes in empty state views.

title: AppSelectionCard and AppInputShell use raw shadow literals — tokens exist but unused
description: radius: 10, y: 4 raw literals when AppShadow.cardRadius / AppShadow.cardYOffset tokens already exist.
evidence: Raw shadow values alongside existing tokens

title: ImportSourcePickerView + ImportPreviewView are dead views — unreferenced
description: Both files exist but are never wired into any navigation path.
evidence: No references found outside the files themselves
recommended_fix: Remove or wire into import feature nav

title: NotificationPermissionPrimingView is dead — never shown
description: Smart-reminders shipped T1-T4 but this priming screen is unreferenced.
recommended_fix: Wire into notification permission flow or remove

title: 17 @State properties + async logic in view — needs ViewModel extraction
description: Network/parse async logic mixed with view state. Violates separation of concerns.
evidence: 17 @State vars, async network calls in view body

title: Milestone detection business state as @State in view layer
description: shownMilestoneStreak, shownMilestonePhase, milestoneTitle, milestoneMessage — business logic as view state.

title: Thumbs-up/down buttons missing accessibilityLabel — VoiceOver reads raw SF Symbol names
description: Interactive feedback buttons have no accessibility labels.

title: 'Maybe later' dismiss button missing accessibilityHint
description: Dismiss button has no hint explaining what it does.

title: Raw .font(.system(size: 56)) for bell icon
description: Hardcoded size for illustration icon in dead view.
recommended_fix: Use token if view is kept; remove with view if dead

title: Raw .font(.system(size: 28)) for AI sheet button icon
description: Minor hardcoded size in tab bar.

title: 'Choose File' card is a silent no-op — no disabled state or feedback
description: Tap does nothing, no visual indication it's not functional.
recommended_fix: Add .disabled(true) with visual state, or implement functionality

title: RecommendationOutcome built and immediately discarded — dead code
description: _ = outcome — outcome is constructed but unused until DI is wired.
recommended_fix: Wire to RecommendationMemory or remove dead construction

title: 8 v1 Onboarding HISTORICAL files co-exist with v2 counterparts
description: Consistent with v2 rule; batch archival deferred per backlog.
evidence: 8 files without v2/ prefix alongside v2/ versions
recommended_fix: Batch archival when convenient — not blocking
